prerequisites: A PayFit account with admin access (required to create an API key in the integrations hub).
An API key generated from the PayFit integrations page (used as the api_key secret).
Your PayFit company identifier (used as the company_id config field, passed as the {companyId} path parameter on company requests).

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate by sending your PayFit API key in the Authorization header as a bearer token (Authorization: Bearer YOUR-API-KEY). The key is created by an admin from the PayFit integrations hub with the scopes the integration needs. This maps to the connector's api_key secret field.

setupSteps.title: Create a PayFit API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to PayFit as an admin, open the integrations page (https://app.payfit.com/integrations/hub/api), and select Create a key. Give the key an explicit label and assign the scopes required for the data you want to read. Copy the generated key immediately, since it cannot be viewed again in the PayFit interface; it is the value for the api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Find your company ID
setupSteps.body: Identify your PayFit company identifier. PayFit company endpoints are addressed as /companies/{companyId} on https://partner-api.payfit.com, so this value is required to scope requests to your company. Enter it as the company_id field.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the api_key (sent as Authorization: Bearer <api_key>) and company_id. With an API key you can only access your own company's data, so make sure the key was created in that company's PayFit account.

sources.title: Authentication via API Key - PayFit API documentation
